indicators.name: marble dining table
indicators.rationale: The marble dining table is too large and obstructive for yoga practice.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: The white chairs are too close to the table and obstruct the open floor space.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: The hardwood flooring provides a firm, non-slip base surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is an open floor area available for yoga practice.

indicators.name: ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights provide ambient lighting suitable for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The scene is moderately suitable for yoga practice. While the marble dining table and white chairs obstruct the open floor space, the hardwood flooring and open area provide a suitable base and space for yoga. The ceiling lights also contribute to a suitable lighting condition. However, the presence of the table and chairs significantly reduces the available space for yoga practice.
